'''ngasoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khanegah|khanegah]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-s-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khanegah|khanegah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngasoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæseteth|ngæseteth]] || [[word:ngæsetej|ngæsetej]] || [[word:ngæsetesh|ngæsetesh]] || [[word:ngæsete|ngæsete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngasosototh|ngasosototh]] || [[word:ngasosotoj|ngasosotoj]] || [[word:ngasosotosh|ngasosotosh]] || [[word:ngasosoto|ngasosoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngasototh|ngasototh]] || [[word:ngasotoj|ngasotoj]] || [[word:ngasotosh|ngasotosh]] || [[word:ngasoto|ngasoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngasoftoth|ngasoftoth]] || [[word:ngasoftoj|ngasoftoj]] || [[word:ngasoftosh|ngasoftosh]] || [[word:ngasoftof|ngasoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngasototho|ngasototho]] || [[word:ngasotojo|ngasotojo]] || [[word:ngasotosho|ngasotosho]] || [[word:ngasotoko|ngasotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngasototh|ngasototh]] || [[word:ngasotoj|ngasotoj]] || [[word:ngasotosh|ngasotosh]] || [[word:ngasoto|ngasoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngasotothol|ngasotothol]] || [[word:ngasotojol|ngasotojol]] || [[word:ngasotoshol|ngasotoshol]] || [[word:ngasotokol|ngasotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngasotothotho|ngasotothotho]] || [[word:ngasotojojo|ngasotojojo]] || [[word:ngasotoshosho|ngasotoshosho]] || [[word:ngasotoko|ngasotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngasotothon|ngasotothon]] || [[word:ngasotojon|ngasotojon]] || [[word:ngasotoshon|ngasotoshon]] || [[word:ngasotokon|ngasotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngasotothoro|ngasotothoro]] || [[word:ngasotojoro|ngasotojoro]] || [[word:ngasotoshoro|ngasotoshoro]] || [[word:ngasotokoro|ngasotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
